subject: Re: Steve Kosslyn- Dinner 3/13

people might change

let'so it ..as the place will remain a constant as the

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

hi c...

a question for JE: i've been getting estimates for a
private dining room
(with a blackboard brought in) at the harvard
faculty club, inn at harvard,
and the charles hotel. i just got the below. would
JE like to take them upon
their offer, or should i find somewhere else?

thanks,
s.

From: "Laura Abbott" labbott@fas.harvard.edu
To: "'Stephen M. Kosslyn'"
smkosslyn@wjh.harvard.edu
Subject: Dinner 3/13 or 3/15?
Date: Tue, 28 Feb 2006 12:07:25 -0500
Thread-Index: AcY8iMqQyHIfRpV0RNKpYUIkzCVQcw==
Status:

Dear Stephen Kosslyn,

I was asked to determine whether or not there are
still plans for a
follow-up dinner on either the 13th or 15th of
March. If so, would you still
wish to have it at PED, even though Martin will not
be able to attend? I
will start making arrangements if necessary, but I'd
be grateful to have
some advance warning as to the date and anticipated
numbers. Seeing as we've
done it once, however, it should be fairly easy to
arrange a second time if
required.

Many thanks,

Laura

Laura H Abbott

Research Assistant

Program for Evolutionary Dynamics

Harvard University

One Brattle Square, Ste 6

Cambridge, MA 02138
